name: Unsweetened Soy Milk

pros.title: cheap staple with real payoff
pros.explanation: This matters because a food is stronger when people can actually use it often.

pros.title: does a lot of jobs at once
pros.explanation: Protein, fibre, and meal utility are why legumes stay valuable.

pros.title: filling for the calories
pros.explanation: Legumes usually earn a lot of practical value from satiety.

cons.title: dilution makes it less impressive than whole legumes
cons.explanation: The legume identity is still there, but not in full strength.

cons.title: protein quality still has a ceiling
cons.explanation: Good, but not meat or dairy level.

cons.title: texture is not universally loved
cons.explanation: That can reduce how often people actually use them.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
